message:
feat(cli): add trace/decision/policy IDs and observability mode to all frankenctl command outputs

Every frankenctl command family (compile, run, verify, replay, doctor)
now emits trace_id, decision_id, policy_id, and an observability_mode
block in its JSON output:

- New ObservabilityModeOutput struct with mode_id, capture_semantics,
  and lossless fields
- Two helper constructors: default_capture_observability_mode()
  (mode_id="default_capture", lossless=false) and
  support_bundle_export_observability_mode()
  (mode_id="support_bundle_export", lossless=true)
- Doctor command conditionally uses lossless mode when --out-dir is
  specified (support bundle export scenario)
- New cli_replay_ids function derives deterministic trace/decision/policy
  IDs for replay commands from session ID and replay mode

Integration tests (87 new lines) assert all five command families emit
the correct identity and observability fields in both stdout JSON and
file report output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
